title: Chio HTTP Stream Frame
description: A single streamed tool-output frame emitted over the chio-http edge. Mirrors the JSON-RPC notification constructed by `queue_tool_stream_chunk_notifications` in `crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime/protocol.rs` (lines 94-117). Each frame is a JSON-RPC 2.0 notification carrying one chunk produced by `ToolCallStream::chunks` (see `crates/chio-kernel/src/runtime.rs` lines 109-125) and uses the wire method `notifications/chio/tool_call_chunk` declared in `crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime.rs` line 53. The optional `_meta.io.modelcontextprotocol/related-task` annotation is appended by `attach_related_task_meta_to_message` when the originating tool call has a related task identifier.

jsonrpc.description: Protocol version literal. Always the string '2.0'.

method.description: Chio tool-streaming notification method, exposed in code as `CHIO_TOOL_STREAMING_NOTIFICATION_METHOD`.

requestId.description: Identifier of the originating tool-call request. Mirrors the JSON-RPC `id` value the caller supplied (typically a string or integer).

chunkIndex.description: Zero-based index of this chunk within the stream.

totalChunks.description: Total number of chunks the kernel observed for this stream at notification time. Equal to `ToolCallStream::chunk_count()`.

chunk.description: Chunk payload. The kernel forwards `ToolCallChunk::data` verbatim and applies no shape constraints, so any JSON value is permitted.

_meta.description: Optional MCP-style notification metadata. Chio attaches the related-task annotation when a parent task is in flight.
